name: feature.comments.nodes
description: Comments feature node pack (ADR 0014/0021) — read/post/resolve nodes over the ctx.features.comments surface. list reads a resource thread; post adds an (agent-authored) comment to a commentable resource; resolve marks a comment resolved. Tenant-guarded; the post emits a tenant-scoped notification through the existing seam.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Comments: List Thread
nodes.description: Lists a resource's comment thread over ctx.features.comments. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: Comments: Post
nodes.description: Posts a comment (or reply, via parentId) on a commentable resource (cms_page | kb_collection) over ctx.features.comments. The resource is validated in-org.

nodes.label: Comments: Resolve
nodes.description: Marks a comment resolved over ctx.features.comments. Tenant-guarded.
